${DESCRIPTION}

## Crates

Published to [crates.io](https://crates.io):

- [`os-truststore`](https://crates.io/crates/os-truststore/${CRATE_VERSION})

```toml
[dependencies]
os-truststore = "${CRATE_VERSION}"
```

See the [CHANGELOG](https://github.com/sylin-org/os-tools/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md) for the
full list of changes.
